name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Marseille Soap Scented 5l
shortDescription: Give your cat a cleaner space with natural bentonite litter that clumps fast, locks in moisture, and fills the room with a soft Marseille Soap aroma.
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Marseille Soap Scented Cat Litter , 100% natural bentonite cat litter instantly clumps. Excellent pelletising, instantly lumps Neutralises odour with fresh Marseille Soap scent Non-toxic and 100% natural Thin grain shape Prevents bacterial growth Upon first use, we recommend adding new cat litter to the surface of the old cat litter for a few days.
